creator: co9co9@gmail.com
text:
Hi Edwin,

I approve the patch although, I am not able to verify it because my FreeBSD
system has crashed (due to a hardware failure, of course).

Regards,

Robin

On Sat, Aug 16, 2008 at 5:30 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of math/clp,
>
> Please note that PR ports/126555 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/126555
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
